info.name: Chapaa Moyo API

request.description:
Authenticate with email or phone number + password.

`credential` accepts:
- Email address: admin@moyo.tz
- Phone (E.164): +255700000000
- Phone (local): 0700000000

Returns JWT access token (15min TTL) + refresh token (7 days TTL).

response.name: 401 Invalid credentials

request.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token. Call this when the access token expires (401 response).
Invalidates the current refresh token server-side. Frontend should also clear stored tokens.
Returns all KPI stats shown on the Overview page: total raised, goal, available balance, contributors, today's total, etc.
Returns the authenticated partner's campaign details.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "campaign_moyo_2026",
    "slug": "moyo",
    "name": "Moyo — Children Cardiac Surgery Fund",
    "category": "Medical · Paediatric Cardiac Care",
    "organisation": "Moyo Foundation",
    "verified": true,
    "goal": 2500000000,
    "raised": 1842500000,
    "end_date": "2026-06-30",
    "public_url": "chapaa.tz/moyo",
    "description": "Life-saving cardiac surgery for Tanzanian children born with heart disease.",
    "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-05-05T10:00:00Z"
  }
}

request.description: Update campaign details. Only fields included in the body are updated (partial update).

request.description:
Creates a disbursement in `pending_otp` status. The frontend must then:
1. Call POST /disbursements/:id/otp/send
2. User enters OTP
3. Call POST /disbursements/:id/otp/verify

Business rules:
- `amount` must be > 0 and ≤ available balance
- `payment_account_id` must belong to this campaign
- Disbursements > TZS 100,000,000 require co-approval from a second admin
- OTP expires after 5 minutes

response.name: 422 Insufficient balance

request.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP via SMS to the registered admin phone number. OTP is valid for 5 minutes. Can be called again to resend (rate limited: once per 60s).
Verifies the OTP and executes the disbursement. On success, status changes to `pending` (processing) → `paid` (complete). After 3 failed attempts, the disbursement is cancelled.

response.name: 200 OK — Disbursement confirmed

request.description: Returns all saved bank accounts for this campaign. These are the destination accounts for disbursements.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Adds a new bank account to the campaign. Required fields: account_name, bank_name, account_number. Optional: branch.
Permanently removes a payment account. Returns 409 if the account has pending disbursements.

query.description: Number of past days to return: 7 | 14 | 30 | all

request.description: Day-by-day contribution totals for the chart on Overview and Analytics pages.
Breakdown of total contributions by payment channel (M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, etc.) for the doughnut chart.
Breakdown of contributions by geographic region for the bar/geo list.
Distribution of contributions by amount bracket for the bar chart on Analytics page.
Lists all available generated reports (weekly, monthly, audits, exports).

request.description: Returns a short-lived (15 min) signed download URL for the report file. Frontend should redirect or open the URL directly.
Lists all admins who have access to this campaign dashboard.

Invites a new admin. They will receive an email/SMS with a setup link.

Available roles:
- `owner` (only one allowed)
- `medical_director`
- `finance_officer`
- `viewer`
Removes an admin's access to the campaign. Cannot remove owner (role: owner). Returns 403 if attempting to remove self.
Public endpoint — no authentication required. Returns campaign data for the public fundraising page: raised amount, goal, progress, stats, recent activity.

request.description: Public endpoint — no authentication required. Returns non-anonymous top donors for the public donor wall. Anonymous contributions are excluded.

response.name: 200 OK
